title: Hawser Edge + Bifrost
description: Dockhand Edge agent tunnelled through a Bifrost WireGuard connection

env.name: DOCKHAND_SERVER_URL
env.label: Dockhand Server URL (via tunnel, e.g. http://10.13.13.1:9000)

env.name: STACKS_PATH
env.label: Stacks Storage Path (host path or named volume)

note: Deploys 2 containers: hawser-bifrost (WireGuard, NET_ADMIN) and hawser-edge (network_mode: service:bifrost). All Dockhand traffic flows through the WireGuard tunnel — nothing exposed on the public network. Set DOCKHAND_SERVER_URL to the Dockhand instance's tunnel IP (e.g. http://10.13.13.1:9000).
